description: May regains consciousness after being drugged and finds herself in Sarge's custody. Sarge questions her about her connection to Coulson, expressing skepticism about her story and his own identity. Meanwhile, Snowflake prepares to pursue another target at Sarge’s order, showing the ruthless dynamic of Sarge’s team.

transcript.line: This whole island's like a sound machine. Was I snoring?
Because you have violent tendencies. A little concoction in the water you drank. But nap time's over.
We're pretty isolated out here. Shouldn't be any interference. It's a bag and gag. Keep it simple. Check in when you're done.
So serious for such a pretty face.
Snow. Pax and Jaco are gone. You're all I've got. I need to know you can handle this.
Yes, Sarge. I've got it. Unless you'd rather go. I'd be happy to keep our guest company. She has so much potential.
You know... you're gonna do great.
Well, look at us. All by our lonesomes at last.
What do you want? Why am I here?
